mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_board.nextVal FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_MENTEE_BOARD(menteeBoard_number, board_title, board_content, member_number) VALUES(#{menteeBoardNumber}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{memberNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT m.member_number, m.member_id, b.menteeBoard_number, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_date, b.board_read_count FROM tbl_member m JOIN UB_MENTEE_BOARD b ON b.member_number = m.member_number WHERE b.menteeBoard_number = #{menteeBoardNumber}
